federation_webhooks.test_message: This is a test webhook delivery from Project NEXUS.

goals.buddy_joined_owner: {{name}} is een maatje geworden voor jouw doel: "{{title}}"
goals.buddy_note_nudge: Een vriendelijke herinnering om in te checken wanneer je kunt.
goals.buddy_note_encouragement: Het gaat goed met je. Blijf doorgaan.
goals.buddy_note_offer_help: Ik kan je helpen als je de volgende stap wilt bespreken.
goals.buddy_note_celebration: Die vooruitgang is het vieren waard!
goals.buddy_note_note: Je vriend heeft een briefje gestuurd.
goals.buddy_action_nudge: een duwtje in de rug gestuurd

polls.ranking_received: {{name}} submitted a ranking on your poll: "{{title}}"

wallet_admin.grant_received: You received {{amount}} {{unit}} from your timebank coordinator
wallet_admin.balance_adjusted_added: Your balance was adjusted: +{{amount}} {{unit}} added by coordinator
wallet_admin.balance_adjusted_removed: Your balance was adjusted: -{{amount}} {{unit}} removed by coordinator

volunteer.shift_signup_confirmed: You're signed up for a volunteer shift on {{date}}
volunteer.shift_signup_cancelled: Your volunteer shift signup has been cancelled

marketplace_offer.received: {{buyer}} made an offer of {{amount}} on your listing "{{title}}"
marketplace_offer.accepted: Your offer on "{{title}}" has been accepted!
marketplace_offer.countered: The seller countered your offer on "{{title}}" with {{amount}}
marketplace_offer.withdrawn: {{buyer}} withdrew their offer on your listing "{{title}}"

marketplace_order.confirmed_seller: You have a new order #{{order_number}} for "{{title}}"
marketplace_order.partially_refunded: Partial refund of {{amount}} {{currency}} processed for order #{{order_number}}

marketplace_payment.local_order_not_found: Er is geen lokale bestelling gevonden voor deze betaling.
marketplace_payment.only_buyer_confirm: Alleen de koper kan de betaling bevestigen.

admin_bells.comment_hidden: Your comment has been hidden by a moderator.
admin_bells.comment_removed: Your comment has been removed by a moderator.

admin_bells.review_hidden: Your review has been hidden by a moderator.
admin_bells.review_removed: Your review has been removed by a moderator.

admin_bells.insurance_verified: Your insurance certificate has been verified!
admin_bells.insurance_rejected: Your insurance certificate was not approved. Please contact support for details.
admin_bells.report_resolved: Your report has been reviewed and resolved.
admin_bells.vetting_rejected: Your verification could not be completed. Please contact support.
admin_bells.vetting_removed: Your verification record has been removed.
admin_bells.volunteer_approved: Your volunteer application has been approved!
admin_bells.volunteer_declined: Your volunteer application was not accepted.

admin_bells.monitoring_under_review: Your account has been placed under review by your timebank coordinator.
admin_bells.monitoring_lifted: Your messaging restrictions have been lifted.
admin_bells.account_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
admin_bells.account_banned: Your account has been banned. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
